twitter_thread: Lost 27% of users due to address typos? Nxtpaper Addresses fixes this with 40% fewer errors.
TCL NOTE A1 NXTPAPER's geolocation auto-completes addresses in 2 seconds, 4x faster than manual entry.
15% of duplicate data in CRM systems comes from manual address entry. Nxtpaper Addresses stops this.
Nxtpaper integrates with Salesforce and HubSpot, eliminating 90% of address data silos.
Generic address templates cause 20% formatting errors. Custom fields in Nxtpaper fix this.
With 95% data consistency, Nxtpaper Addresses saves 10 hours/week in data cleanup.
What's the most address-related headache you've had in a productivity app? #nxtpaper #productivity
